title: Recruitment Job Posting Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Recruitment Job Posting Tools, helping staffing agencies post jobs.
content:
Recruitment Job Posting Overview

Job posting is important for staffing agencies to advertise positions. Staffing agencies need job posting tools including job creation, posting distribution, job management. Recruitment job posting tools help agencies achieve job creation, posting distribution, job management.

Platform Reviews

Bullhorn Job Posting

Bullhorn provides CRM-integrated job posting features. Job creation features create job postings. Posting distribution features distribute postings. Job management features manage job postings.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting job posting tools should focus on job creation, posting distribution, job management, and cost structure.
author: Job Posting Research Institute
